name: Fruitcake Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 14 oz. can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (1 1/4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine in a saucepan.
2. Pour the melted butter into a 15-by-10-by-1-inch baking pan.
3. Evenly sprinkle vanilla wafer crumbs on top of the butter layer.
4. Arrange the halved green candied cherries, red candied cherries, chopped candied pineapple, and chopped dates evenly over the crumb mixture.
5. Gently press down to ensure the fruits and nuts are well-covered by the crumbs.
6. Combine the Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk and bourbon in a separate bowl.
7. Evenly pour the liquid mixture over the top of the fruitcake layer.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes.
9. Turn off the oven heat.
10. Allow the cake to cool completely before cutting into squares.
11. This recipe makes approximately 60 squares.
